entry.title: New: CR 24-60 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FILING of Resolution 24-49, relating to placing on the next General Election ballot the question of whether the Revised Charter of the County of Maui (1983), as amended (“Charter”), should be amended, effective July 1, 2025, to allow Board of Ethics members to be reappointed for a second term without an intervening waiting period.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
